title: HARNEY COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: SYMMETRY CARE INC HARNEY COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises through a county crisis line. 348 W Adams Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk-in: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-8376 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis line (541) 573-8376 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SYMMETRY CARE INC
